prompt: How can I cancel my order?
reference: You can cancel your order from your Orders page before the order has been shipped. If the order has already been shipped, you may need to initiate a return after delivery.

prompt: I want a refund for my purchase.
reference: Refunds are processed after the returned item has been received and inspected. Once approved, the refund is issued to your original payment method.

prompt: How do I change my shipping address?
reference: You can change your shipping address before the order is shipped from the Orders section of your account or by contacting customer support.
Check your tracking information first. If the estimated delivery date has passed, contact customer support so they can investigate the shipment.
We're sorry to hear that. Please upload photos of the damaged item and contact customer support. A replacement or refund will be arranged according to our policy.

prompt: How do I track my order?
reference: Go to the Orders section of your account and select your order to view the latest tracking information provided by the shipping carrier.

prompt: I entered the wrong delivery address.
reference: If your order has not yet shipped, you can update the delivery address from your account or contact customer support immediately.
Verify your payment details, ensure sufficient funds are available, and try again. If the issue continues, contact your bank or customer support.

prompt: How do I return an item?
reference: Visit the Orders section, select the item you wish to return, and follow the return instructions. Once the return is approved, ship the item using the provided label.

prompt: How can I contact customer support?
reference: You can contact customer support through live chat, email, or the support section available on our website or mobile application.
